title: BABIES FIRST! - 211info
text: ASHER COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER BABIES FIRST! Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A public health nurse (PHN) home visiting program that partners with families to improve pregnancy, family and child health outcomes. Provides health and developmental screenings, health and nutrition education, infant and child development tips, breastfeeding support, and referrals to community resources that center on the family's needs. 712 Jay Street Fossil, OR 97830 Eligibility: Perinatal people, infants and children 0-5, and parent or primary caregivers with a higher risk for health issues. Risk factors may include prematurity, teenage parents, at-risk caregiver, domestic violence, drug-exposed infants. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 763-2725 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 763-2725 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by site LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Wheeler County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-noon Services: Case/Care Management * Families with Infants/Toddlers Home Based Parenting Education Nutrition Education * Families with Infants/Toddlers Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Teen Expectant/New Parent Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - TITLE X REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH WELL VISIT OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HEALTH SERVICES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ASHER COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER
